Broodmind.name: Psychic Stimulus
Broodmind.effect: The target can't gain Battleshock tokens by any means and loses all current tokens.

Broodmind.name: Mental Onslaught
Broodmind.effect: Roll 5D6. For each 5+ the target suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1; Seeking. If at least one model died from this attack, repeat the process.

Broodmind.name: Mass Hypnosis
Broodmind.effect: Each model of the target suffers -1 Attack.

Broodmind.name: Might from Beyond
Broodmind.effect: The target receives +1 Strength and +1 Attack

Broodmind.name: Mind Control
Broodmind.effect: The target receives a -1 penalty to hit rolls.

Broodmind.name: Psionic Blast
Broodmind.effect: The target suffers five automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Broodvolt Surge
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: The target unit gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Inescapable Decay
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: All attacks against the target unit gain an additional -1 AP.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Last Gasp
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: Whenever the target unit removes a model, roll a D6. On a 5+, an engaged enemy unit suffers one Mortal Wound.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Mutagenic Deviation
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: The target's melee weapons gain the "Precision(6+)" ability.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Synaptic Blast
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking for each model in the caster's unit.

Legacy Psychic Powers.name: Undermine
Legacy Psychic Powers.effect: The target is treated as activating in difficult and dangerous terrain, even if it would normally ignore it.
